description_long: This is a robust hammer featuring a solid, rectangular black metal head with slightly chamfered edges and a central wooden handle. The head is thick and blocky, with a flat striking face on each end, making it suitable for heavy-duty tasks such as breaking concrete or driving stakes. The handle is cylindrical, made of light brown wood, and appears smooth with a visible grain pattern. A red and white label is affixed to the lower part of the handle, providing a touch of color and possibly indicating the brand or safety information. The hammer's construction suggests durability and reliability for use in construction, repair, or demolition work. There are no visible signs of wear, damage, or additional attachments.
description: A heavy-duty hammer with a black rectangular metal head and a smooth wooden handle, featuring a red and white label. The design is sturdy and utilitarian, ideal for construction or demolition tasks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the black metal head and the cylindrical wooden handle with a visible label.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow profile of the hammer head and the round top of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the opposite face of the hammer head and the handle visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile of the head and the handle's top.
attribute_handle_type: wooden straight handle, cylindrical, smooth surface, no visible grip enhancements
attribute_head_type: rectangular sledge-type head, solid steel, dual flat striking faces, no claws or peen
attribute_brand_or_logo: A red and white label is visible on the handle, but the brand name is not clearly readable
